summary: P0 and P1 Finance Module Bug Fixes - All 18 backend tests passed. Verified: receipt/invoice idempotency, credit purchase exclusion from cashbook, refund status lifecycle, account duplicate prevention, account archive/restore, and purchase return status lifecycle.
passed_tests: P0-1: Receipt idempotency key returns existing receipt instead of creating duplicate
P0-1: Receipt duplicate detection within 60 seconds correctly rejects with 409
P0-2: Cashbook (GET /api/accounting/transactions) excludes credit purchases by default
P0-2: include_non_cashbook=true parameter correctly includes non-cashbook entries
P0-3: Purchase return refund is correctly recorded as INFLOW (verified txn_d9cc5726a736)
P0-4: Refund with status='initiated' does NOT create cashbook entry
P0-4: Refund with status='completed' DOES create cashbook entry
P0-4: Updating refund status to 'completed' creates cashbook entry
P1-5: Duplicate account name correctly rejected with 409
P1-5: Case-insensitive duplicate account name detection works
P1-6: Account archive (soft delete) works correctly
P1-6: Account restore from archived state works correctly
P1-6: Archived accounts excluded from default list
P1-7: Purchase return status endpoint exists
P1-7: Invalid status values correctly rejected
P1-7: Invalid status transitions correctly rejected
critical_code_review_comments: P0-1 Receipt Idempotency: Implemented correctly with idempotency_key field and 60-second duplicate detection (lines 26788-26812)
P0-2 Credit Purchase Exclusion: Cashbook filter correctly excludes entries with is_cashbook_entry=False or no account_id (lines 20529-20541)
P0-3 Purchase Return Refund: Correctly creates INFLOW transaction when status='refund_received' (lines 32193-32222)
P0-4 Sales Refund Lifecycle: Only creates cashbook entry when status='completed' (lines 27068-27103, 27173-27207)
P1-5 Account Duplicate Prevention: Case-insensitive name check and bank/branch duplicate check (lines 19844-19865)
P1-6 Account Archive/Delete: Soft delete by default, hard delete only if no transactions, restore endpoint works (lines 19988-20116)
P1-7 Purchase Return Status Lifecycle: Valid transitions enforced (initiated→vendor_accepted→refund_pending→refund_received→completed) (lines 32129-32158)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: proj_8aeea5f1, acc_d3cd5544, PR-202502-TEST01
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 and P1 finance module fixes verified. Purchase return PR-202502-TEST01 was transitioned through the full lifecycle (initiated→vendor_accepted→refund_pending→refund_received) and created an INFLOW transaction. Multiple test accounts were created for duplicate detection tests.

P0-1_receipt_idempotency.idempotency_key: Returns existing receipt if key matches

P0-2_cashbook_filter.default_behavior: Excludes credit purchases (is_cashbook_entry=False or no account_id)
